settings.description: Cardioid pickup captures natural, studio-quality voice clarity, while the built-in shock mount minimizes unwanted vibrations and table noise. Monitor Mix Control lets you balance voice and system audio directly from the microphone, complete with a detachable full-metal pop filter and instant mute / ENC controls for seamless recording and streaming.

settings.specs_table_1:
Model Number | WFM1
Microphone Type | Condenser
Lighting Effects | RGB 12 Modes
Capsule Size | 14 mm
Polar Pattern | Cardioid
Frequency Response | 20 Hz - 20 KHz
S/N Ratio | 75 dB
Maximum SPL | 112 dB
Sensitivity | -38 ± 3 dB
settings.specs_table_2:
Sampling Rate | 48 kHz
Bit Depth | 24-bit
Battery Capacity | 800 mAh
Battery Life | Up to 40 Hours
Charging Time | Approx. 3 Hours
Interface | USB-C, 3.5mm TRS
Cable Length | 1.8m PVC
Power Rating | 5V ⎓ 1A
Compatibility | PC, Laptop, Tablet, and Smartphone with USB-C or USB-A Port
Connectivity | 2.4GHz, Wired
